description: Spring Boot configuration class for setting up security with stateless JWT authentication, CORS configuration for browser clients, and request authorization rules.

classes.name: SecurityConfig
classes.description: Configuration class for Spring Security, managing CORS, session policy, exception handling, and request authorization.

methods.name: corsConfigurationSource
methods.description: Defines CORS configuration, setting allowed origins, headers, methods, and cache duration for browser cross-origin requests.

methods.name: securityFilterChain
methods.description: Configures the Spring Security filter chain with CSRF disable, CORS, stateless sessions, exception handling, request rules, and integrates JWT authentication filter.
